type.description: Type is a machine-readable identifier, e.g. "Ready", "Phase".

status.description: Status is one of True, False, Unknown.

lastHeartbeatTime.description: LastHeartbeatTime is when this condition was last sampled.

lastTransitionTime.description: LastTransitionTime is when the Status last changed.

reason.description: Reason is a CamelCase word summarising why the condition has this status.

Condition.description: Condition describes a single observable aspect of a resource's state.

NetworkMode.description: Connectivity mode reported by the Tailscale/Headscale overlay network.

apiVersion.description: APIVersion identifies the versioned schema this resource conforms to, e.g. "caravanserai/v1".

kind.description: Kind is the resource type, e.g. "Node", "Project".

Node.title: Node
Node.description: Node represents a physical or virtual machine managed by a Caravanserai Agent.

ip.description: IP is the Headscale-assigned overlay IP (e.g. "100.64.0.5").

dnsName.description: DNSName is the MagicDNS FQDN for service discovery.

mode.description: Mode is Direct when a peer-to-peer path exists, DERP otherwise.

agentPort.description:
AgentPort is the TCP port the Agent's HTTP server listens on.
Used by caractl to construct the Agent address for port-forward tunnels.

throughput.description: Throughput is measured by the Agent at startup and periodically.

NodeNetworkStatus.description: NodeNetworkStatus reports the overlay-network state of a Node.

hostname.description: Hostname is the OS-level hostname of the machine.

unschedulable.description:
Unschedulable, when true, prevents new Projects from being scheduled
onto this Node. The TaintsController will automatically add a
NoSchedule Taint when this field is true.

NodeSpec.description: NodeSpec contains the administrator-declared configuration of a Node.

NodeState.description: Top-level health summary computed by the Controller Manager.

state.description: State is the high-level summary: Ready | NotReady | Draining.

capacity.description: Capacity is the raw physical resource total reported by the Agent.

allocatable.description:
Allocatable is Capacity minus system-reserved amounts, also reported
by the Agent. The Scheduler subtracts running-Project usage to derive
the effective available headroom.

lastHeartbeat.description:
LastHeartbeat is the timestamp of the most recent heartbeat received
from the Agent. The NodeController uses this to detect timeouts.

conditions.description: Conditions is a list of observable Node conditions.

NodeStatus.description: NodeStatus is written by the Agent (heartbeat fields) and the Controller Manager (aggregated state, injected taints).

NodeThroughput.description: NodeThroughput holds the last measured upload/download speeds of a Node.

name.description: Name is the unique identifier within its Kind namespace.

labels.description: Labels are arbitrary key/value pairs used for selection and grouping.

annotations.description: Annotations are non-identifying metadata (e.g. human-readable hints).

createdAt.description: CreatedAt is set by the server on first write.

updatedAt.description: UpdatedAt is set by the server on every write.

ObjectMeta.description: ObjectMeta holds identity and classification metadata common to all resources.

ResourceList.description: ResourceList is a named set of resource quantities — cpu, memory, disk — whose values follow the same string format as Kubernetes: "500m", "4Gi", "100Mbps".
